title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for chatting with Ollama models, embeddings, and tool calling.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama as a chat or embeddings backend.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file upload, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android support and reactive extensions.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli (rust)
summary: Fast Rust CLI for pulling, listing and chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama into a free local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistence options.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and CLI for Ollama with async streaming and tool calling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain in a single Docker compose.

title: ollama-mistral-ft
summary: Official example showing how to fine-tune Mistral-7b locally and serve it with Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on your notes using Ollama.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for building and running Ollama declaratively on NixOS.

title: ollama-rust-sdk
summary: Community Rust SDK providing strongly-typed async APIs for Ollama.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer and streaming support.
